subject: hotel room for wspp meeting in scottsdale, az, march 22 & 23

emails.subject: Re: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 & 23
emails.subject_base: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 & 23
emails.body: Re: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 23 I think we should stop going to these meetings. We have a memo in which we list ten good reasons why the EEI is better than the WSPP. If we stop going, the additions to the list will accelerate, thus playing into our overall strategy. Any thoughts to the contrary?----cgy Kaye Ellis 03/12/2001 07:17 AM

emails.subject: Re: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 & 23

emails.subject: Re: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 & 23
emails.subject_base: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 & 23
emails.body: Re: Hotel Room for WSPP Meeting in Scottsdale, AZ, March 22 23 CY I'm not sure I kind of think we need to keep going to some of these meetings, if nothing else to educate the industry and to listen to the western crowd. With limited resources we will need to figure out which ones but Talk to you later ES
